name: Write DLFS File
description: Write content to a file in a DLFS drive. Creates the file if it does not exist; overwrites if it does. Parent directories must already exist — use dlfs:mkdir first if needed. Accepts UTF-8 text via 'content', a JSON-serialisable value via 'value', or a content-addressed asset via 'asset'. Binary uploads from clients should use the WebDAV PUT transport at /dlfs/{drive}/{path} directly.
creator: Covia

content.description: UTF-8 text to write. Use exactly one of 'content', 'value', or 'asset'.

value.description: JSON-serialisable value to write as UTF-8 JSON. Use exactly one of 'content', 'value', or 'asset'.

asset.description: Asset reference to write as file content (e.g. '/a/0x1234...', DID URL). Streams binary directly — no size limit.

created.description: True if file was newly created
